zh.lifeSummary: 當William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII於大約1499年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓時，他的父親Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington40歲，母親Margery Ann Grey31歲。他於大約1550年與Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1562年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII于大约1499年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特阿生頓时，他的父亲Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington40岁，母亲Margery Ann Grey31岁。他于大约1550年与Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1562年在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barbe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Laurent, Andre, Gillis, Jean Pierre, Serge, Sylvie, Thierry, Yves.
French: descriptive nickname for someone with a beard, Old French barbe (from Latin barba).
French (Barbé): adjectival derivative of 1, meaning ‘bearded’.

variants.name: Barb
meanings: German: variant of   Barbe  . This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace).
Romanian: variant of   Barbu  .

variants.name: Barbier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Emile, Pierre, Alexandre, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Laurette, Manon, Marcel, Marcellin, Michel.
French: occupational name for a barber-surgeon (see Barber ), Old French barbier (from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’). Compare Barbe and Barbee .
German: occupational name for a barber, from Middle High German barbierer, or an occupational name for an armorer, from barbier(e) ‘metal visor (to protect the face)’.

variants.name: Barbon
meanings: English: habitational name from Barbon in Westmorland. The placename is probably from Old Norse bjórr ‘beaver’ + brunnr ‘stream’, alternatively from Old English bera ‘bear’ + burna ‘stream’.
English: nickname from Middle English bare bon ‘bare bone’, perhaps denoting a thin or bare-legged man.
French and English (of French Huguenot origin): nickname for a bearded man, from an augmentative of French   Barbe  .

variants.name: Barby
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Otto, Wolfgang.  French Celestine, Pierre.
German: habitational name from a place so named in Saxony-Anhalt.
French (mainly Dordogne): derivative of   Barbe   1.

variants.name: Barbin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Angelle, Marcel.
French: diminutive of   Barbe   1.

variants.name: Barbot
meanings: French:
from the Old French female personal name Barbot, a diminutive of Barbe , a short form of Barbara .
nickname for someone who tended to speak indistinctly, from French barboter ‘to babble’, or for someone with a beard, from a diminutive of Old French barbe ‘beard’.

variants.name: Barbay
meanings: French: variant of Barbé (see Barbe ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: name bestowed in honour of the medieval poet Dante Alighieri ( 1265–1321 ), also used in the English-speaking world. As a medieval given name Dante was a contracted form of Durante ‘steadfast, enduring’. In an English context it was famously borne by the pre-Raphaelite poet and painter Dante Gabriel Rossetti ( 1828–1882 ), the son of an exiled Italian scholar and patriot.

en.lifeSummary: When William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII was born about 1499, in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington, was 40 and his mother, Margery Ann Grey, was 31. He married Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe about 1550, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1562, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII est né environ 1499, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margery Ann Grey, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe environ 1550, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1562, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII um 1499 in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington 40 und seine Mutter Margery Ann Grey 31. Er hat um 1550 in Wiltshire, England Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1562 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII è nato il circa 1499 nel Ashington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margery Ann Grey, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe circa 1550, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1562, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIIIが約1499年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで生まれた時，父Richard Saint Barbe of Ashingtonは40歳，母Margery Ann Greyは31歳であった。約1550年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでMrs Elizabeth Saint Barbeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1562年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII(이)가 대략 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Ann Grey(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1562년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII nasceu aproximadamente 1499, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margery Ann Grey, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe aproximadamente 1550, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1562, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII родился около 1499 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Ann Grey, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe около 1550 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1562 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Saint Barbe Privey Chamber to Henry VIII nació aproximadamente 1499, en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margery Ann Grey, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mrs Elizabeth Saint Barbe aproximadamente 1550, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1562, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
